name: Real Estate Investment Trust Election

eligibility.description: Must be a corporation/trust with 100+ shareholders, meet 75% and 95% gross income tests from real estate/passive sources, and meet asset diversification requirements.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: An eligible entity can elect to be taxed as a REIT, allowing it to deduct dividends paid and effectively avoid entity-level taxation on distributed income.
